examples: Some sedatives produce the paradoxical effect of making the person more anxious.
It is paradoxical that some of the poorest people live in some of the richest areas of the country.
The Swedes will find this paradoxical and try to find solutions.
The paradoxical effect of government aid is that it makes people going to college worse off.
It is even more paradoxical when one stops to think about the reality behind these fears.
